creator: apina@infolink.com.br
text:
Also reported in freebsd-stable.

        Whenever I try "make buildworld" inside /usr/src, cc1 core dumps with signal 4.
        /etc/defaults/make.conf is the default, no sources changes at all.

eg:
--------------------------------------------------------------

Fix: 

?
How-To-Repeat: 
	rm -f -r /usr/obj/* && make buildworld
